inline_comments.message:
The below dependency must be added for runtime env to work with jersey client.
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.glassfish.jersey.inject</groupId>
            <artifactId>jersey-hk2</artifactId>
            <version>2.27</version>
        </dependency>
Version 2.0.1 of this package comes pre-installed with Opendaylight Oxygen.  We need to use that version, otherwise we run the risk of version conflicts (ClassNotFoundExceptions)

This is okay, I think. Version 1.19.4 of  the com.sun version of Jersey client comes preinstalled with ODL, but if we're using org.glassfish's version that should not create a conflict (assuming the package names are also org.glassfish.* vs com.sum.*)
Please remove the version tag from this dependency so that you pick up the installed version (2.0.1)

RestconfDiscoveryNode needs to establish Server Sent Event (SSE) which is introduced from JAX-RS 2.1. If we downgrade this than RestconfClient which is using RestApiCallNode to sendHttpRequest will not work. Kindly suggest.

I see.  The only concern I have is that I see that the ODL shiro package expects version 2.0.1 of this package. I'll try loading version 2.1 in addition in my dev environment and make sure nothing breaks and, if not, I have no problem adding version 2.1 as part of the "dependences" package in ccsdk/distribution (that's where we install additional third party libraries)
